languages.text: {n}Укрепления поселений были рассчитаны на флору и фауну, и хотя урок, что преподали железные ксеносы своей первой атакой, и был усвоен, полностью переделать оборону на Заркове не успели. И все же враг был откинут, несмотря на то, что Клеть и другие людские поселения теперь напоминают скотобойню.{/n}

{n}The settlements' fortifications were designed for flora and fauna, and although the Merovians had learned their lesson after the iron xenos' first attack, there was no time to completely rebuild Zarkov's defences. Nevertheless, the enemy was driven back, despite the fact that the Cage and the other human settlements now resembled a slaughterhouse.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Укрепления поселений были рассчитаны на флору и фауну, и хотя урок, что преподали железные ксеносы своей первой атакой, и был усвоен, полностью переделать оборону на Заркове не успели. И все же враг был откинут, несмотря на то, что Клеть и другие людские поселения теперь напоминают скотобойню.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The settlements' fortifications were designed for flora and fauna, and although the Merovians had learned their lesson after the iron xenos' first attack, there was no time to completely rebuild Zarkov's defences. Nevertheless, the enemy was driven back, despite the fact that the Cage and the other human settlements now resembled a slaughterhouse.{/n}

{n}The settlements' fortifications were designed for flora and fauna, and although the Merovians had learned their lesson after the iron xenos' first attack, there was no time to completely rebuild Zarkov's defences. Nevertheless, the enemy was driven back, despite the fact that Tsar-Cage and the other human settlements now resembled a slaughterhouse.{/n}

{n}The settlements' fortifications were designed for flora and fauna, and although the Merovians had learned their lesson after the iron xenos' first attack, there was no time to completely rebuild Zarkov's defences. Nevertheless, the enemy was driven back, despite the fact that Tsar-Cage and the other human settlements now resembled a slaughterhouse.{/n}

{n}The settlements' fortifications were designed for flora and fauna, and although the Merovians had learned their lesson after the iron xenos' first attack, there was no time to completely rebuild Zarkov's defences. Nevertheless, the enemy was driven back, despite the fact that the Cage and the other human settlements now resembled a slaughterhouse.{/n}

languages.text: {n}この集落の防御は植物や動物を考慮して設計されており、鉄の異種族の最初の攻撃で教訓を学んだメロヴィング朝でしたが、ザルコフの防御を完全に再建する時間はありませんでした。それでも敵は撃退され、ツァー・ケージや他の集落は屠殺場と化したものの{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The settlements' fortifications were designed for flora and fauna, and although the Merovians had learned their lesson after the iron xenos' first attack, there was no time to completely rebuild Zarkov's defences. Nevertheless, the enemy was driven back, despite the fact that Tsar-Cage and the other human settlements now resembled a slaughterhouse.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}この集落の防御は植物や動物を考慮して設計されており、鉄の異種族の最初の攻撃で教訓を学んだメロヴィング朝でしたが、ザルコフの防御を完全に再建する時間はありませんでした。それでも敵は撃退され、ツァー・ケージや他の集落は屠殺場と化したものの{/n}

languages.text: {n}Las fortificaciones de los asentamientos habían sido diseñados para la flora y la fauna, y, aunque los merovianos habían aprendido la lección tras el primer ataque de los xenos mecánicos, no habían tenido tiempo para reconstruir las defensa de Zarkov por completo. Sin embargo, a pesar de que la Jaula y otros asentamientos humanos ahora parecían un matadero, el enemigo fue rechazado.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The settlements' fortifications were designed for flora and fauna, and although the Merovians had learned their lesson after the iron xenos' first attack, there was no time to completely rebuild Zarkov's defences. Nevertheless, the enemy was driven back, despite the fact that the Cage and the other human settlements now resembled a slaughterhouse.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Las fortificaciones de los asentamientos habían sido diseñados para la flora y la fauna, y, aunque los merovianos habían aprendido la lección tras el primer ataque de los xenos mecánicos, no habían tenido tiempo para reconstruir las defensa de Zarkov por completo. Sin embargo, a pesar de que la Jaula y otros asentamientos humanos ahora parecían un matadero, el enemigo fue rechazado.{/n}

languages.text: {n}定居点的防御工事本是为应对当地动植物而建。虽然吸取了首轮异形袭击的教训，但梅罗夫人根本没时间彻底重建扎尔科夫的防御体系。无论如何，敌人还是被击退了——尽管如今的牢笼等人类定居点，已与屠宰场无异。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The settlements' fortifications were designed for flora and fauna, and although the Merovians had learned their lesson after the iron xenos' first attack, there was no time to completely rebuild Zarkov's defences. Nevertheless, the enemy was driven back, despite the fact that the Cage and the other human settlements now resembled a slaughterhouse.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}定居点的防御工事本是为应对当地动植物而建。虽然吸取了首轮异形袭击的教训，但梅罗夫人根本没时间彻底重建扎尔科夫的防御体系。无论如何，敌人还是被击退了——尽管如今的牢笼等人类定居点，已与屠宰场无异。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Befestigungen der Siedlungen waren für Pflanzen und Tiere gedacht, und obwohl die Merovianer aus dem ersten Angriff der eisernen Xenos gelernt hatten, blieb keine Zeit, Zarkovs Verteidigung vollständig wiederherzustellen. Der Feind konnte zwar trotzdem zurückgeschlagen werden, aber der Käfig und die anderen Siedlungen der Menschen glichen nun einem Schlachthaus.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The settlements' fortifications were designed for flora and fauna, and although the Merovians had learned their lesson after the iron xenos' first attack, there was no time to completely rebuild Zarkov's defences. Nevertheless, the enemy was driven back, despite the fact that the Cage and the other human settlements now resembled a slaughterhouse.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Befestigungen der Siedlungen waren für Pflanzen und Tiere gedacht, und obwohl die Merovianer aus dem ersten Angriff der eisernen Xenos gelernt hatten, blieb keine Zeit, Zarkovs Verteidigung vollständig wiederherzustellen. Der Feind konnte zwar trotzdem zurückgeschlagen werden, aber der Käfig und die anderen Siedlungen der Menschen glichen nun einem Schlachthaus.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Yerleşimlerin tahkimatları, flora ve fauna için tasarlanmıştı. Merovlular, demir zenoların ilk saldırısından sonra derslerini almış olsa da Zarkov'un savunmasını tamamen yeniden inşa etmeye zaman yoktu. Kafes ve diğer insan yerleşimleri artık bir mezbahaya benzese de düşman geri püskürtüldü.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The settlements' fortifications were designed for flora and fauna, and although the Merovians had learned their lesson after the iron xenos' first attack, there was no time to completely rebuild Zarkov's defences. Nevertheless, the enemy was driven back, despite the fact that the Cage and the other human settlements now resembled a slaughterhouse.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Yerleşimlerin tahkimatları, flora ve fauna için tasarlanmıştı. Merovlular, demir zenoların ilk saldırısından sonra derslerini almış olsa da Zarkov'un savunmasını tamamen yeniden inşa etmeye zaman yoktu. Kafes ve diğer insan yerleşimleri artık bir mezbahaya benzese de düşman geri püskürtüldü.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les fortifications de la colonie avaient été conçues pour faire face à la faune et à la flore, et bien que les Meroviens eussent tiré les enseignements de la première attaque des xénos de fer, ils n'eurent pas eu le temps de reconstruire entièrement les défenses de Zarkov. Toutefois, l'ennemi fut repoussé, non sans que la Cage et les autres bastions humains prennent l'allure d'un abattoir.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The settlements' fortifications were designed for flora and fauna, and although the Merovians had learned their lesson after the iron xenos' first attack, there was no time to completely rebuild Zarkov's defences. Nevertheless, the enemy was driven back, despite the fact that the Cage and the other human settlements now resembled a slaughterhouse.{/n}
